title: BACI International Trade Database HS17 V202401
used_for: Global semiconductor trade flows by country. HS codes 8541 and 8542.
notes: Bilateral trade data for 200+ countries 1995-2024. BACI reconciles exporter/importer discrepancies from UN Comtrade raw data. Free download with registration.

title: yfinance Python Library — Public Company Financials
used_for: Annual revenue, capex, R&D spend for AMAT/ASML/LRCX/KLAC/UCTT/TSM/INTC/MU/NVDA
notes: Data sourced directly from SEC-reported financials via Yahoo Finance API. Annual cadence. Tickers: AMAT, ASML, LRCX, KLAC, UCTT, TSM, INTC, 005930.KS, MU, NVDA.

title: Semiconductor Companies of the World by Market Cap
used_for: Company name, country HQ, market cap, sector for dimension table.
notes: Used as dim_company table in Snowflake. Verify key company entries against current market data before publishing.

title: International Trade Database
used_for: Backup trade flow dataset if BACI processing encounters issues.
notes: Sourced from UN Comtrade. Use as validation layer against BACI primary source.

title: CHIPS Incentives Awards Tracker
used_for: Company names, award amounts, states, status for all CHIPS Act awards.
notes: Official SIA tracker. Most authoritative public source for CHIPS award status.

title: GAO-26-107882: Semiconductors — Information on Projects Funded to Strengthen U.S. Supply Chain
used_for: Award amounts, milestone counts, completion timelines as of July 2025.
notes: GAO independent audit. Covers 40 projects across 19 companies. Published Dec 11 2025.

title: Tracking CHIPS and Science Act Awards
used_for: Award dates, proposed vs finalized status, renegotiation flags.
notes: Includes Trump administration renegotiation context. Updated Sept 2 2025. Cross-referenced with SRC005.

title: CHIPS Incentives Awards Press Releases
used_for: Individual award finalization dates and exact amounts.
notes: Official Commerce Dept press releases. Used to verify date_finalized for each award row.

title: Executive Briefing: Germanium and Gallium — U.S. Trade and Chinese Export Controls
used_for: China share of US gallium supply (95%). Gallium price increases post-July 2023 controls (+68%).
notes: Government analysis. Cites USGS critical minerals list. Price data from Reuters/Strategic Metals Invest.

title: China's Germanium and Gallium Export Restrictions: Consequences for the United States
used_for: Export volume data 2023-2024. China exports of germanium to US dropped to zero in 2024.
notes: Cites China General Administration of Customs data. Reputable think tank. Published April 2025.

title: China bans exports to US of gallium germanium antimony
used_for: December 3 2024 outright ban on gallium/germanium/antimony exports to US.
notes: Direct news report of policy announcement. AP wire — primary news source.

title: China's export controls on critical minerals aren't starving the United States — at least so far
used_for: US import share data for gallium arsenide wafers. GaAs wafer imports from China fell to near-zero post-July 2023.
notes: Reputable economics think tank. Uses US Customs data. Nuanced — argues impact less than feared as of Oct 2024.

title: Critical Raw Materials Report — China share of gallium (94%) and germanium (83%) global supply
used_for: China produces 94% of global gallium and 83% of global germanium.
notes: EU government source. Widely cited by USITC and other government bodies.

title: Twenty-five years of building resilience in Taiwan: Looking back at the 1999 Chi-Chi earthquake
used_for: 1935 Mw7.1 earthquake epicenter 20km from Hsinchu. 1999 Chi-Chi caused $400M semiconductor losses. 15+ Mw6.0+ events since 1999.
notes: Moody's insurance risk analysis. Cites USGS and internal seismic data. Published Aug 2025.

title: 7.0 Quake Hits: TSMC Nears Full Production Sector Losses Reportedly Tens of Billions NTD
used_for: Dec 27 2025 Mw7.0 quake details. Hsinchu intensity level 4. Quartz furnace tube damage. 3-5 day recovery minimum.
notes: TrendForce is semiconductor industry research firm. Cites Liberty Times and Commercial Times Taiwanese media.

title: TSMC earthquake losses — April 2024 ($92.4M) and Q1 2025 ($162M)
used_for: TSMC earthquake-related losses: $92.4M in April 2024 and $162M in Q1 2025.
notes: Cites TSMC quarterly filings as primary source. Verify directly against TSMC 20-F filings on SEC EDGAR.

title: China & Taiwan Update March 20 2026
used_for: PLA coast guard encirclement drills active. PLAAF activity patterns March 2026. Iran conflict context.
notes: Joint ISW-AEI product. Weekly updates. Used for current_status_of_scenario column Scenario B.

title: As China rehearses a blockade Taiwan's coast guard prepares to push back
used_for: Taiwan deputy minister confirmed China practicing full blockade of ports. Kaohsiung and Keelung drills.
notes: Used for Scenario B active status confirmation.

title: TSMC advanced node market share >90% sub-7nm
used_for: TSMC controls >90% of global advanced node (sub-7nm) production.
notes: Industry consensus figure. Widely cited. Verify against TSMC annual report and TrendForce Q4 2024 foundry report.

title: Critical Materials Report — US 100% reliant on imported germanium
used_for: United States does not have sufficient domestic resources for germanium and gallium.
notes: Official US government assessment. Still accurate as of 2026 — no domestic refining capacity built since publication.

title: Automotive chip inventory and JIT supply chain analysis
used_for: Automotive industry typical chip inventory 30-45 days. JIT manufacturing assumption.
notes: AlixPartners widely cited in 2021-2023 semiconductor shortage analysis. Verify current inventory norms against recent reporting.

title: US share of global leading-edge logic manufacturing — 0% in 2022 projected 20% by 2030
used_for: US domestic coverage figures for us_domestic_coverage_pct_2030 column.
notes: Commerce Dept official projection. Used as basis for all Scenario us_domestic_coverage estimates.

title: TSMC Q4 2025 Earnings — Revenue NT$1T+ foundry market share 72%
used_for: TSMC revenue Q4 2025: NT$1 trillion+. 72% foundry market share. 35% YoY net income growth.
notes: Primary source. Verify directly against TSMC 6-K filing on SEC EDGAR for exact figures.

title: GDP impact of complete gallium/germanium halt estimated $3.1-3.4B
used_for: GDP impact estimate for Scenario C gdp_impact_b_if_prolonged column.
notes: Derived estimate. Quest Metals cites USITC modeling. Flag as estimate in any presentation.

title: 2021 Global Chip Shortage — $210B automotive industry losses
used_for: $210B lost automotive revenue from 2021 chip shortage used as Scenario A automotive precedent.
notes: Widely reported figure. AlixPartners primary cited source. Used as real-world precedent not projection.
